name: 蒋晟

appearance.face: 面容老实憨厚，容易脸红
appearance.body: 习武之人，身材结实挺拔

visual_reference: A young ancient Chinese martial artist, 20 years old, sturdy build, honest and naive face, wearing dark green martial arts Hanfu, realistic.
personality: 老实，体贴，容易害羞，缺乏防备心
desire: 爱慕高令宁，希望能保护她
scene_presence: 马球会陪伴女主，后在高家被陆姝仪设计。

relationships.dynamic: 小心翼翼地讨好与保护
relationships.function: 引发沈词嫉妒的工具人
